name: sbox-claude
description: Build s&box games by talking to Claude. Bundles the Claude Bridge MCP server (199 tools / 190 editor handlers, incl. networking/scene inspection & lint, save & services queries, scaffolds for a currency wallet / round-phase machine / day-night clock / interactable / weighted loot table / versioned save system / leaderboard panel / slot inventory / stat modifier system / placement mode, sandbox+razor lints, an asset dependency-chain copier, and call-method/input-action/drive-player/time-scale/profiler/debug-draw tools), a screenshot-driven game-dev workflow skill (sbox-build-feature), a schema-grounded s&box API skill (sbox-api: Unity->s&box translation + components/UI/networking/physics references, adapted from claude-sbox), the sbox-cookbook recipe router (code-grounded recipes from 51 open-source s&box games -- 11 engine + 18 system + 20 genre references + a cross-game CORPUS-INDEX), a sbox-scaffold-game starter, and an optional sbox-game-dev specialist agent. The s&box editor addon must be installed separately (see README).
